stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are cruising at FL380 with a twin-engine jet aeroplane. Due to airspace restrictions ATC instructs you to descend to FL360 and change your speed to Mach 0.727. Given the following information, what is the fuel you will use for the remainder of the cruise time?

Distance to Top-of-Descent: 220 NM
Aircraft mass: 50 000 kg
TAT: -42°C
Average wind component: 45 kt tailwind

Consider a constant aircraft of mass 50 000 kg for calculation purposes.
